issues_found.description: Browser console was showing undefined values being coerced to 0 in performance calculations
issues_found.root_cause: Dashboard fetchers not validating NULL responses before display
issues_found.detection_method: Console log inspection + network tab correlation

fix_applied.change: All fetchers now explicitly handle missing data with error objects instead of empty defaults

issues_found.verification: ✓ Console logs now show proper error handling, no undefined coercions

issues_found.description: API responses sometimes returned data directly, sometimes wrapped in 'data' field
issues_found.root_cause: Route handlers using different response patterns

fix_applied.behavior: Standardized response unwrapping across all fetchers

issues_found.verification: ✓ All responses now follow consistent structure

issues_found.description: Missing P&L values were displaying as 'undefined' in position tables
issues_found.root_cause: Frontend not handling None/null values from API

fix_applied.change: All missing financial values now explicitly handled before serialization

issues_found.verification: ✓ Tables now show '-' or 'N/A' for missing data, not undefined

recommendations: Monitor console for any new undefined coercions
Continue using safe_float() and safe_int() for all type conversions
Validate API responses at dashboard layer before rendering
conclusion: ✅ All browser console errors resolved. Data integrity now enforced at API layer.
